name: redis-ctl
description: Start, stop, restart, or check Redis server status in one step, replacing which+redis-server+sleep+redis-cli ping chains.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: start (default), stop, restart, status, check

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses which+redis-server --daemonize+sleep+redis-cli ping or redis-cli shutdown into one step, saving 3-4 agent steps per Redis operation.
